benefits.description: Works extremely well on women; described as being constantly 70% aroused. Spicy effects persist even after nausea/brain fog wears off.

side_effects.description: Nausea possible if too much taken or taken without food
Brain fog at higher doses or when taken without eating, wears off

protocol_notes: Recommends starting with a very low dose for women. Started at 1mg and found it plenty. Mentions having zofran on hand as precaution. Also reports husband had no nausea or brain fog on any dose; husband experienced persistent erections from any stimulation. Notes difference in time to feel effects between men and women.
